label: Transparent parrotfish motif
workflow: Built-in image_gen on flat #ff00ff chroma key, followed by local alpha extraction with remove_chroma_key.py.
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only one single parrotfish for a Morphous design-system catalog, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: an accurate tropical parrotfish in clean side profile, full body visible, with beak-like mouth, turquoise head and belly, pink coral face patches, lime green scale bands, coral-orange fin accents, pearly scale texture, and subtle reef-shadow blue contours. It should feel playful and ecosystem-minded while remaining anatomically believable and polished as a catalog motif.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop fins, tail, mouth, or body. Slightly curved swimming posture, readable silhouette.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves scale detail, iridescent surface color, and natural fish anatomy.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no coral, no reef background, no water scene, no second fish, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Parrotfish", derived from the visible transparent parrotfish motif in this conversation.
Reference use: Extract palette, scale texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the parrotfish motif. The board must visibly respect turquoise body color, pink coral face patches, lime scale bands, coral-orange fins, pearly scale highlights, and tropical reef context.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, target 3840x2160 4K-class source image.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable section labels, generous spacing, and a precise grid. Avoid dense tiny tables. Text must be clean and legible at gallery preview size.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Parrotfish", motif story "playful ecosystem system", palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
Palette labels to show: Reef Foam, Parrot Turquoise, Scale Lime, Coral Pink, Fin Coral, Lagoon Ink, Pearl Highlight, Reef Shadow.
Typography: include English product UI guidance and Japanese typography guidance with readable sample labels such as "生態系ダッシュボード" and "礁の記録". Use multilingual font guidance for playful but serious ecosystem dashboards.
Components: buttons, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, popover, table, search command menu, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard KPI cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty state, error state, loading state.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product design-system board, realistic crisp UI mockup, work-focused dashboard surface, 8px radius cards, controlled shadows, parrotfish-scale texture strips, fin-edge dividers, reef-map chart cards.
Color palette: airy reef-foam background, white and pearl card surfaces, turquoise primary controls, lime status and chart accents, coral-pink interaction highlights, coral-orange warning/destructive accents, lagoon-ink text. Use motif-derived colors only plus near-neutrals from the fish.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no generic blue ocean app, no unrelated purple gradients, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no dark-mode-only surface.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Parrotfish". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible parrotfish motif.
Reference use: Use the visible parrotfish motif and the visible light-mode Morphous Parrotfish board as references. Preserve turquoise primary controls, coral-pink interaction highlights, lime ecosystem status, coral-orange fin accents, parrotfish scale texture, 8px radius, typography hierarchy, and ecosystem dashboard UI coverage.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, target 3840x2160 4K-class source image.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels, generous spacing, and a precise grid. Avoid dense tiny token tables. Text must stay legible at gallery preview size.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Parrotfish", label "Dark Mode", motif story "playful ecosystem system", palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
Palette labels to show: Lagoon Ink, Reef Shadow, Parrot Turquoise, Scale Lime, Coral Pink, Fin Coral, Reef Foam, Pearl Highlight.
Typography: include English product UI guidance and Japanese typography guidance with readable sample labels such as "生態系ダッシュボード" and "礁の記録". Use multilingual font guidance for ecosystem dashboards and monitoring tools.
Components: buttons, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, popover, table, search command menu, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard KPI cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty state, error state, loading state.
Visual details: deep lagoon-ink background, reef-shadow panels, reef-foam text, turquoise primary actions, lime status and chart accents, coral-pink selected states, coral-orange warning/destructive accents, subtle scale texture overlays, crisp shadcn/tweakcn-compatible cards and controls.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no generic blue ocean app, no neon nightclub palette, no pure flat black background, no unrelated purple gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no misspelling of "Morphous Parrotfish" in the main title.
